narrative.headline: Electrical gremlins and driver-assist glitches top 2019 Odyssey complaints
narrative.summary: Electrical and advanced driver-assistance system failures dominate owner complaints for this model, with dashboard warning lights activating unexpectedly and collision-mitigation and lane-keeping systems dropping out while the vehicle is in motion. Forward collision avoidance and lane departure systems generate overlapping reports, often describing the same warning message appearing on the dashboard, suggesting the issues may be related. Engine-area complaints round out the top concerns, with at least some reports describing seat hardware behavior that owners characterize as a safety issue.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report multiple dashboard warning lights activating simultaneously while driving, accompanied by loss of lane keep assist and adaptive cruise control during normal operation on freeways and city roads. · 1 fire · 1 crash · 2 injured

issues.title: Forward Collision Avoidance
issues.blurb: Owners report a collision mitigation system warning appearing on the dashboard, followed by the digital display going blank and the steering wheel shaking violently while the vehicle is in motion. · 2 crash

issues.sample: In September 2021, I started occasionally receiving the error message "Collision Mitigation System Problem" on my dashboard. It would appear and quickly disappear. At that time, my car shut itself off when I came to a full stop at traffic lights and stop signs 3 different times.
issues.title: Lane Departure
issues.blurb: Owners report an intermittent error message reading 'Collision Mitigation System Problem' appearing and disappearing on the dashboard, in some cases accompanied by the vehicle shutting itself off when coming to a stop.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report that second-row seats do not lock into place when folded forward, describing the unsecured seat as a hazard while the vehicle is in motion and as an entrapment risk for third-row passengers attempting to exit. · 4 fire · 2 crash · 2 injured

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: 120 complaints (14%) about the drivetrain and transmission. No crashes, fires, or injuries reported in this group.
